case_title: MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION VS KIN WO CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,290.95 FILED BY MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION $2,290.95 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,370.95, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFT AMERCAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY C. EXECUTION OF JUDGEMENT STAYED FOR 30 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
